_schema_note: Multi-view backend benchmark scoring rubric. v3 spec, item 12 Phase 1. Each dimension is scored 0-10 per (backend, subject, run); weighted total >= 6.5 required to qualify a backend.

geometric_accuracy.method: Hausdorff distance to ground-truth scan when available; manual visual score otherwise. Lower distance = higher score.

texture_fidelity.method: SSIM + visual review of UV-mapped textures vs reference photos.

speed_studio.method: Wall-clock seconds on studio tier (M3 Ultra Mac Studio). 0-10 mapping: under 30s = 10, over 300s = 0, linear in between.

speed_laptop.method: Wall-clock seconds on laptop tier (M-series Mac laptop). Same mapping as studio.

install_footprint.method: Total disk: venv + model weights. 0-10 mapping: under 4 GB = 10, over 30 GB = 0, linear in between.

license_clarity.method: Pre-computed: commercial_safe=10, commercial_threshold=7, non_commercial=4, unclear_risky=0 (DISQUALIFY unless a separate review completes).

candidates.name: trellis
candidates.notes: Already partially integrated for single-image use. Multi-view mode is built in.

candidates.name: instantmesh
candidates.notes: Tencent license; needs separate review (mirror of P2.3) before this candidate can pass. Auto-DQ until review completes.

candidates.name: openlrm
candidates.notes: Apache 2.0. Lower quality than the closed alternatives; the only fully commercial-safe path.

reproducibility.lighting: Uniform white-background studio lighting; no harsh shadows.
